entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: 'Crime_Category' → 'Country'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key 'Crime_Category' → Crime_Category entity. Second-level key 'Country' → Country entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (Crime_Category) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Country). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "Year", "Rate_per_100k".
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key 'Crime_Category' defines the root entity (Crime_Category).
Second-level key 'Country' defines child entities (Country) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
